title: potentilla multifida var. hypoleuca
intro: Potentilla multifida var. hypoleuca, also known as the Himalayan cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Potentilla multifida var. hypoleuca include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
